component.name: Icon
component.description: Renders one of 20 inline SVGs from the fixed icon set. Uses currentColor so it inherits the surrounding text color. Size is controlled via size.icon.* tokens.

when: Providing a visual cue alongside a label (Button leading icon, form field prefix)
Indicating direction or action in a compact space (chevrons, plus, minus)
Communicating theme state (sun/moon-star for light/dark toggle)

antiPatterns.scenario: Using Icon as the sole accessible label for an interactive control
antiPatterns.reason: aria-hidden=true by default; a visually icon-only button has no accessible name.
antiPatterns.alternative: Pass the label prop to set aria-label, or wrap in a Button with a visually-hidden text label.

antiPatterns.scenario: Adding icons outside the fixed set
antiPatterns.reason: The set is intentionally small. Adding arbitrary icons bloats the bundle and fragments the visual language.
antiPatterns.alternative: Choose the closest existing icon, or propose expanding the fixed set deliberately.

antiPatterns.scenario: Setting a raw color value on the Icon element
antiPatterns.reason: Icon uses currentColor — color must be set on an ancestor element using a semantic token.
antiPatterns.alternative: Wrap in a span with color: var(--ds-color-text-brand) or similar.

purpose.sm: 16px — use inside dense UI elements such as tags, badges, or inline metadata.
purpose.md: 24px — default; use alongside body text, in buttons, and as standalone affordances.

states.description: Static — no interactive states on the icon itself.

accessibility.notes: Icons are decorative by default (aria-hidden=true). When an Icon is the only content conveying meaning, pass the label prop to add aria-label and role=img.

compositionPatterns.name: icon-label-pair
compositionPatterns.description: An Icon followed by a Text label inside an Inline, used for navigation items and feature callouts.
